# terrible_community_crypto_openssl_privatekey_convert (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dest_path` (String) Name of the file in which the generated TLS/SSL private key will be written. It will have `0600` mode if `mode` is not explicitly set.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `backup` (Boolean) Create a backup file including a timestamp so you can get the original private key back if you overwrote it with a new one by accident.

### Read-Only

- `backup_file` (String) Name of backup file created.
